title: Akismet Spam Protection Plugin
description: Admin configures API key and spam settings; Akismet.com remote service manages alerts; REST API exposes key management, settings, and stats

actors.name: Admin
actors.description: WordPress site admin with manage_options capability; authenticated via WordPress session

actors.name: Akismet.com
actors.description: Remote Akismet API server; initiates alert lifecycle calls using API key as auth token

actors.name: WordPress REST API
actors.description: WordPress core REST framework; routes registered under namespace akismet/v1

use_cases.name: Set API Key
logic: Reject if WPCOM_API_KEY constant defined (hardcoded key, HTTP 409)

use_cases.name: Get Spam Settings
use_cases.logic: Returns akismet_strictness (bool) and akismet_show_user_comments_approved (bool) from wp_options

args.akismet_strictness: boolean — auto-discard worst spam vs. put in folder
args.akismet_show_user_comments_approved: boolean — show approved comment count per author

use_cases.name: Get Spam Stats
logic: POST to Akismet 'get-stats' endpoint with blog, key, from

use_cases.name: Get Alert
use_cases.permission: remote_call_permission_callback → key param must match stored key
use_cases.logic: Returns akismet_alert_code and akismet_alert_msg from wp_options

permission_model: remote_call_permission_callback: request param 'key' must case-insensitively match stored API key — Akismet.com server calls only
key_relationships: Akismet_REST_API calls Akismet::get_api_key() for key retrieval
Akismet_REST_API calls Akismet::http_post() + Akismet::build_query() for verify-key and get-stats
Akismet_REST_API calls Akismet::verify_key() to refresh alerts
Akismet_REST_API reads/writes wp_options for key, settings, and alert state
Akismet_Admin (UI) mirrors key management but via POST form (NONCE: akismet-update-key)
Akismet_REST_API::init() hooks into WordPress rest_api_init action
settings_options: akismet_strictness — auto-discard worst spam if true
akismet_show_user_comments_approved — show approved count per author if true
akismet_alert_code — current alert code from Akismet.com
business_rules: API key is hardcoded (WPCOM_API_KEY constant) on WordPress.com — set/delete blocked with HTTP 409
Key must pass verify-key check against Akismet.com before being saved
Stats intervals restricted to: 60-days, 6-months, all; invalid values default to 'all'
Alert endpoints use API key as bearer token (not WordPress session) — designed for server-to-server calls from Akismet.com
